<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / release
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest -v` passes locally
- [ ] `mypy app` passes locally (if Python code changed)
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets or real domains committed

## Security impact

- [ ] No change to mailbox enumeration behaviour
- [ ] No logging of full email addresses or request bodies
- [ ] Needs security review (explain below)
